title: レース場グルメの誘惑

text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I have come to watch a
race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Soba, udon, steak, soft serve ice cream, carrot
donuts—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No. Earlier in class, we were discussing racecourse
food.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This scent of excessively seasoned junk food... I'd
never noticed it before, but now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Its inescapable allure is drawing me in!
choice_data_list: Do you want to take a look?
Do you want to take a look?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. I cannot deny the curiosity born from
everyone's discussion of these flavors.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's why there is something for which I must
request your cooperation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would disgrace the Mejiro family name if I am
left completely ignorant of the foods being
offered here. So, would you come have a taste
with me?

An interesting proposition, but everything on
offer sounds rather unhealthy.
choice_data_list: You know what, let's eat until we're stuffed!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's! Now, I will take half—no! Just a bite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The strong flavor comes as a surprise initially,
but... Yes, I can see why this is a popular topic of
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I seldom get to experience this sort of flavor at
home or at the academy, but just one bite is
enough to tell me it lacks nutritional balance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's delicious, but... you could call it a natural
enemy to those on a diet. Yes, a taboo flavor! I
must be careful not to overindulge.
Mejiro McQueen shivers as we depart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... I can see why this food is such a popular
topic of conversation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've eaten more than I anticipated, which has
resulted in quite a painful situation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not my fault! I was entranced by the
delicious aroma of junk food!

Mejiro McQueen ate so much that she can't seem
to focus on watching the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I understand. If those are your directions,
then I will abide by them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
E-even so, I would like to have the opportunity
someday! After all, it is a Mejiro's duty to expand
her horizons!

Mejiro McQueen seems to have overcome this
temptation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Why would you suggest such a thing?!
You are... aware of my constitution, aren't you?
choice_data_list: A half-hearted attitude doesn't befit a Mejiro!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... I-I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's true. There is some logic to what you say.
Even so, engorging myself willy-nilly would be...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's you two. Did you also come to watch the
race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, uh... y-yes, that's right!
Would you care to join us?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We were just thinking of taking a break to sample
some of the racecourse food. ...Isn't that right,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's nice. I'm in need of a break myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Y-yes! With someone as knowledgeable about
nutrition as Ikuno at my side, I'll have no problem
exercising restraint.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, shall we go take a look at the food? I-I was
thinking I might try something on the lighter side.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Something light? That's surprising. There are a lot
of desserts. I thought for sure you'd be drawn to
those.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urk... Uh, um...
choice_data_list: You're curious about them now, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...I have my eye on the low-sugar crepes. They're
gluten free and rich in protein. They also have a
reputation for being sweet despite the low calorie
count.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My! Such a wonderful thing exists?! I would love
to try it!

Mejiro McQueen enjoys some racecourse food
along with Ikuno Dictus.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I had not considered that! Yes, it's just as you say.
It would be a discredit to the Mejiro name to
claim full understanding from just one measly
bite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well! This is for future reference. I shall
partake to my heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Nom nom... They used quality sweet red beans. The slight saltiness enhances the sweetness, and the dough is delicate and flaky!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Next, I shall try the cream taiyaki! The chocolate
ones look delicious as well. Perhaps I should have
both!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, these churros seem to be freshly made! Such
a wonderful smell... I'd better line up right now!

Mejiro McQueen thoroughly enjoys her sweets.
However, the calories pile on.
